hero.title: Your new chapter deserves care that matches it
hero.description: You've already taken the most important step. Nutribar connects you with specialized nutritionists, with tailored protocols and support at every stage.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: From discharge to a lasting result, in four steps

1.title: Create your account
1.description: Sign up in minutes and share your surgical history. The whole process is online, secure, and in your language.

2.title: Choose your nutritionist
2.description: Select from verified professionals specialized in post-surgery follow-up, with experience in exactly your type of procedure.

3.title: Follow your protocol
3.description: Receive a structured meal plan for your recovery phase, with clinical adjustments at each assessment and guidance to prevent deficiencies.

4.title: Maintain your results
4.description: Track goals, progress, and recommendations in one place, with continuous support to consolidate your result over the long term.

nutritionistsSection.title: Nutritionists ready to walk this journey with you
nutritionistsSection.description: Every Nutribar professional is verified and has real experience supporting women through this new chapter. Choose by specialty, language, and location, and move forward with someone who understands your case.
nutritionistsSection.emptyDesc: We are verifying new professionals to expand our care and ensure specialized follow-up at every step of your journey.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio1: Specialized in nutritional protocols for your new chapter, dietary re-education, and deficiency prevention.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio2: Clinical follow-up for women going through this transition abroad who need support in their own language.
nutritionistsSection.placeholderBio3: Structured guidance for every step of your journey, from the start to maintaining results.

why.title: Why post-operative follow-up is decisive
why.subtitle: The first phases after surgery shape your health for years to come. Specialized nutritional follow-up protects your result.

1.title: Preventing nutritional deficiencies
1.description: After surgery, nutrient absorption changes. A well-managed protocol prevents deficiencies of iron, vitamin B12, protein, and other essential nutrients.

2.title: Structured dietary re-education
2.description: Rebuilding your relationship with food is a process. Your nutritionist guides each phase, from liquids to solids, safely and at your own pace.

3.title: Maintaining results long term
3.description: Continuous follow-up is what prevents weight regain and consolidates the habits that sustain your surgical result.

4.title: Support in your language
4.description: Had surgery abroad? Resume your care with a professional who speaks your language and understands your procedure's protocol.

testimonials.title: Women who found continuity with Nutribar
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories of moving forward with the right support.

1.quote: I came back from abroad not knowing how to eat properly. With my nutritionist, I regained control and already lost 18kg in 6 months, without missing a single nutrient.
1.author: Camila R.

2.quote: The phased plan gave me confidence. In 1 year I lost 22kg and my vitamin B12 and iron levels have never been so balanced.
2.author: Beatriz M.

3.quote: I had already regained some weight before starting. With continuous follow-up, I lost those 9kg again and finally stabilized my weight.
3.author: Fernanda L.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

1.question: Is the care fully online?
1.answer: Yes. All follow-up happens online and securely, wherever you are, with consultations, protocol adjustments, and support between assessments.

2.question: How soon do I start the follow-up?
2.answer: As soon as you create your account and choose your nutritionist, the process begins. Signing up takes just a few minutes.

3.question: How do I choose the right nutritionist for me?
3.answer: You can filter by specialty, language, and location. Each profile shows the professional's clinical experience so you can choose who best understands your case.

4.question: Are the nutritionists verified?
4.answer: Yes. All professionals go through a verification process before appearing on the platform. Only those approved by our team see patients on Nutribar.

5.question: I had surgery abroad. Can I get follow-up in my language?
5.answer: Yes. This is at the heart of Nutribar. You'll find nutritionists who speak your language and know the protocol of the country where you had surgery, so you can resume care without barriers.

6.question: How do the follow-up plans work?
6.answer: Each nutritionist offers monthly, quarterly, or annual plans, with different consultation frequencies, reviews, and support. You choose what makes the most sense for your recovery phase.

7.question: Will I get a personalized meal plan?
7.answer: Yes. Your nutritionist builds a nutritional protocol based on your procedure, your recovery phase, and your progress, adjusting it at each assessment.

8.question: Is my health data secure?
8.answer: Yes. Your information is treated confidentially and used only for your nutritional follow-up within the platform.

9.question: Can I switch nutritionists later?
9.answer: Yes. If you feel another professional fits your case better, you can choose a new nutritionist within the platform.

finalCta.title: Your result deserves continuity
finalCta.description: Don't leave your recovery to chance. Start your follow-up today with a nutritionist specialized in your procedure.
finalCta.reassurance: Sign up in minutes · 100% online · No commitment

footer.description: Post-surgery nutritional follow-up for international patients. We ensure the continuity of your clinical care when you return home.
footer.note: Nutribar is a nutritional follow-up platform and does not replace the guidance of your doctor or surgical team.

nutritionistCard.placeholderBio: Nutritionist specialized in post-surgery clinical follow-up.
nutritionistCard.packMonthlyDescription: Initial consultation + 1 assessment per month, with protocol adjustments and message support between consultations.
nutritionistCard.packQuarterlyDescription: Initial consultation, 3 clinical reviews, detailed recommendations, and continuous follow-up of your progress.
nutritionistCard.packAnnualDescription: Complete 1-year program: regular assessments, protocol adjustments, deficiency prevention, and priority care.
nutritionistCard.noPlans: This nutritionist has not added any plans yet. Get in touch to learn about pricing.
